title: The Photograph
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] The Photograph             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:06 pm Continued from here: LealahLupin3 wrote: Here is the photo, if anyone is interested. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:08 pm Yui is smokin' hot. That is all I have to contribute to this conversation.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:10 pm My instinctive brain saw that during my watching of the movie and said "Asuka?" and then my rational brain caught up and changed it to "Kyoko." or whatever Asuka's mother is named in this continuity.

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:26 pm Asuka's mother comes to my mind. The man in the back looks foreign, very well could be her husband.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:31 pm Maybe it's the odd lighting or just a general case of sameface, but she reminds me of both Asuka and Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:33 pm That's the current problem I've seen; it's a debate over whether this is Mari's mother or Kyoko. She could be either one, really.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:35 pm Or maybe there's a huge twist and SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:36 pm BlueBasilisk wrote: Or maybe there's a huge twist and SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:38 pm Yaywalter wrote: Maybe they don't know they're sisters? Also, why put wild speculation in spoiler tags?

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:38 pm Where do you guys think that this picture was taken? Obviously around 01'/02', but where?

[]:             Quote Post by Yokai » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:42 pm Does anybody have a 1080p lossless screencap of the text on the back? I want to see if anybody can make it out (aka if I can give it a try xD ) I imagine it's probably a photo that Yui sent to Fuyutsuki informing him of having had a baby with a note on the back inviting him to a shower or something. I'onno.

[]:             Quote Post by Yaywalter » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:43 pm Kyoto University, maybe?

[]:             Quote Post by LordEvan88 » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:47 pm I get the impression of a classroom by the wide windows and the whiteboard, and considering Fuyutsuki was her professor (Albiet pre-2nd impact) it makes sense. While the woman's hairstyle is Asuka-y, the glasses and the pink stripes on her shirt seem to point to Mari, which works with the hints of her backstory.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:53 pm Yokai wrote: Does anybody have a 1080p lossless screencap of the text on the back? I want to see if anybody can make it out (aka if I can give it a try xD )

[]:             Quote Post by TruthfulLie » Tue Apr 30, 2013 6:54 pm Yokai wrote: Does anybody have a 1080p lossless screencap of the text on the back? I want to see if anybody can make it out (aka if I can give it a try xD ) I imagine it's probably a photo that Yui sent to Fuyutsuki informing him of having had a baby with a note on the back inviting him to a shower or something. I'onno.

[]:             Quote Post by libs » Tue Apr 30, 2013 7:13 pm The glasses are the same as the one Mari uses in the previous movie as well (in Q she's using a slightly different model). Besides that, there's some organic chemistry stuff going on in the background.

[]:             Quote Post by LealahLupin3 » Tue Apr 30, 2013 7:18 pm I can post the text on the back if you reeeeeeaaaaally want, but it's just way too blurry. I don't think a higher resolution will help much either, to tell you the truth, it was just drawn out of focus because we're supposed to be focusing on Shinji's face. The men in the photo puzzle me. I assumed the guy in the very back would be attached to the unknown woman (at the time I figured he was Asuka's father) but the man with his back to the camera doesn't appear to be Gendo or Fuyutsuki. Or could he be Gendo? The man with his back to us and Shinji appear to be the only people in the photo who aren't smiling; maybe that's supposed to be a connection? Or maybe I'm just seeing things that aren't there.

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:05 pm When discussing mysteries in photographs, there is always one crucial piece of information that is never visible in the picture, but nearly always worth discussing. Who do you think took the picture? My guess is that it was Fuyutsuki , given the classroom-like setting, plus the fact that he owns it and has kept it all this time. Another little clue is that the picture appears to be taken by someone who is taller than the women in the picture (suggesting a male photographer). And finally, the photographer was standing far enough away that other people can be seen wandering in between the photographer and Yui (i.e. the guy on the left who appears to be totally disinterested in the little scene), suggesting that the photographer is not intimate enough with Yui to lean in for a close-up. It all suggests "distant admirer" to me. Oh, and Gendo's absence can be easily explained by the theory that he was not in Fuyutsuki's class. (He was not in NGE, at least.)

[]:             Quote Post by bladerj » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:20 pm the man in foreground is Fuyutsuki, lookat the hair on his ears its the same, the guy on the background looks to me reminscent of gendo or Kaji,more like gendo i think Kaji cheeks are thiner

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Apr 30, 2013 8:28 pm TruthfulLie wrote: I remember the letters being blurry due to DoF in that scene. I don't think any HD screencap will be able to make it readable.
